subject: [PATCH v10 07/15] mm: preserve RWP marker across PTE rewrites

2026-07-08.patch_summary: This patch ensures that the RWP (Read-Only Write-Protection) marker is preserved across PTE rewrites in various kernel paths, including swap, device-exclusive, migration, fork, and mprotect operations. The goal is to prevent the silent loss of this marker, which can lead to incorrect behavior when tracking page accesses. To achieve this, the patch modifies several functions to restore the PAGE_NONE semantics when necessary, effectively preserving the RWP bit across PTE rewrites.
